prestazioni: Upgrade to a **TFG (Tiny Friendly Giant) 2.0L 3-cylinder engine (TFG-2.0)** with a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger** (1.4 bar boost) and **Precision Turbo & Engine 82mm billet compressor wheel** for 1,100+ HP on E85, paired with **Koenigsegg’s 3x electric motors (total 1,700 HP hybrid system)** and a **Quark E-motor upgrade** to 400 kW (536 HP) per unit via **AP Racing carbon-ceramic hybrid brake regen cooling ducts**

Full **Koenigsegg Autosport 9-speed multi-clutch transmission** reinforcement with **Xtrac P1227 sequential internals** and **Motul 300V Trophy 10W-60** transmission fluid for 0.1s shift times, paired with a **Pankl Racing Systems titanium driveshaft** and **GKN Lobro CV joints** for 2,500 Nm torque handling

Custom **Weichers Motorsport 4.5L dry-sump oil system** with **Daikin Industries 10-stage oil pump** and **Mocal 10-row oil cooler** (50% larger than stock), integrated with **Bosch Motorsport MS 5.1 ECU** for **TFG-2.0** and **Koenigsegg’s 800V electric powertrain** via **AEM EV VCU200** for torque vectoring and **Marelli Motorsport inverter cooling**
estetica: Full **Koenigsegg Autosport ‘Ghost’ aero package** with **3D-printed titanium front splitter** (20% lighter than carbon), **active rear diffuser with 4x ServoTech actuators** (adjustable in 0.05s), and **Gurney flaps on the rear wing** (30mm height, **Aerofoil Shop custom NACA 63A012 profile**) for 1,200 kg downforce at 250 km/h

**Rocket Bunny x Koenigsegg ‘Track GT’ widebody kit** with **carbon-fiber fender flares (pre-preg autoclave, 1.2mm thickness)**, **custom 3D-printed aluminum side skirts** (integrated **LED cooling ducts for Quark E-motors**), and **removable polycarbonate rear quarter windows** (Makrolon GP, 4mm thick) for weight reduction

**BBS FI-R II 20x12” front / 21x13.5” rear wheels** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (345/30 R21)** and **HRE Performance Center-lock adapters**, wrapped in **PPG ‘Liquid Black’ matte finish** with **Koenigsegg ‘Ghost’ decal overlay (electroluminescent, 12V)** and **OZ Racing titanium wheel bolts**
